target: 5. Funeral
Shinpei Ajiro
Dad! Shin-chan's back!!
I'm home…
Oh... Shinpei...!! You've grown taller...
Alain, you've gotten a bit thinner...
We can catch up later... Go see Ushio.
Yeah…
(...Alright, let's go. The 4th funeral...!!)
(I'll repeat the previous funeral. Relying only on my memory... the same movements, the same conversations...)
(First, I have to tell her...!! Shiori-chan! To be careful... of the Shadow...!!)
(...Damn it. Approaching her knowing she's a Shadow is nothing but terrifying...)
(If I mess up even a single line, I have no idea what kind of effect it might have...!!)
Shiori-chan! I heard you saw a girl who looked exactly like you...?
Be careful... that might be a monster called a Shadow... Do you know about it? It's called Shadow Sickness...
If... that girl appears again, you absolutely must not get close to her...
Today too... okay... Don't leave your mom and dad's side...
(I knew it.)
(During the previous loop, the reason she didn't copy me was because I talked to her.)
(If I recreate the situation, Shiori won't lay a hand on me...)
(The coffin departs just past 1 o'clock. It's loaded into the car to be taken to the crematorium on the mountain...)
Shinpei-kun.
About what you were saying earlier...
A... yes...
(Even knowing I'd be spoken to, it still startles me...)
About Shiori seeing a Shadow... Did you hear that from Mio-chan?
Yes, well...
(...Th... these two!! In their shadows... ants?)
(...Their shadows moved to avoid stepping on the ants—)
(They were... Shadows!! No way... all three of them...!?)
Shinpei-kun?
Ah... yes...
Mio heard about it from her grandma when she was little... I'm sorry for saying something weird...
Is that so... No, I'm the one who should apologize.

Thank you, Shinpei-kun.
Shiori, let's go.
(The three from the Kobayakawa family... the real ones are probably already... I can't save them anymore... no matter what I do...)
(...Where are you, Nagumo-sensei!!? It's getting more and more too late...!)
(Hurry...!! I have to meet Nagumo-sensei as soon as possible!!!!)
...Shin-chan. Are you okay?
Ah? A-Ah...
(What a disaster... Damn it!! What should I say to Mio...)
(No... should I even say anything in the first place!? Wouldn't it just force fear and anxiety onto Mio?)
(Last time... did I just want to talk to someone to make myself feel better!?)
("Stay silent and protect"... that's the best option...!!)
...Mio. Can I ask you one thing...?
You... The panties you were wearing yesterday... were they white?
Shin-chan!! You come back for the first time in two years and the first thing you ask is... that!!!?
I'm asking seriously...!! I seriously want to know the color of your panties yesterday!!
What happened to you!? Shin-chan!!
(When I was killed by Mio in the 2nd loop!! I accidentally caught a glimpse...)
(Yes... Mio's panties were white...!! However, when Mio fell into the ocean on her bike, her panties were... light blue stripes!!!!)
(I might be able to figure out the day Mio was copied from the color of her panties...!)
Please… tell me!
Yesterday, I stayed at the hall after the wake... and changed... Yeah... it was definitely... white, but... W-What about it!!?
(Which means... Mio was copied yesterday— during the wake on the 21st!?)
(I can't go back to yesterday... In other words, I can no longer prevent Mio from being copied in the first place...!!)
(I have no choice but to... "defeat" her! To protect Mio...!!)
(And to do that, I need to gather information...)
(The 3rd funeral...)
(The flow of the funeral is the same as the previous two times... What should I do here...?)
(That's right... Shiori-chan!)
(Totsumura-san said... Tomorrow, the Kobayakawa family will suddenly disappear. It must be the work of the Shadows.)
(I need to warn them while I still can... To be careful... of the Shadows...!)
Shiori-chan! ...Do you have a moment?
I heard you saw a girl who looked exactly like you...?
Be careful... that might be a monster called a Shadow... Do you know about it? It's called Shadow Sickness...
If... that girl appears again, you absolutely must not get close to her...
Today too... okay... Don't leave your mom and dad's side...
(I've finished warning Shiori-chan. I hope this prevents tomorrow's disappearance, but...)
(After that, the funeral proceeded without a hitch.)
(The coffin departs just past 1 o'clock. It's loaded into the car to be taken to the crematorium on the mountain...)
Shinpei-kun.
Shiori-chan's mom...
About what you were saying earlier...
A... yes...
About Shiori seeing a Shadow... Did you hear that from Mio-chan?
Yes, well...
Mio heard about it from her grandma when she was little... I'm sorry for saying something weird...
Is that so... No, I'm the one who should apologize.

Thank you, Shinpei-kun.
Shiori, let's go.
…Phew.
(I just hope nothing happens to the Kobayakawa family, but...)
(It really is the same. Just like on the ferry earlier, and with Mio's bicycle...)
(Everyone is making the same movements, having the same conversations as in the dream...)
(It's not on the level of deja vu or a prophetic dream.)
(I am... July 22nd...)
(Repeating it once again...)
(...My head... hurts like it's splitting open... The back of my eyes are flickering...)
(What is going on...!? Ushio...)
(Sou said your body had Yoshikawa lines... marks of being strangled by someone...)
Ushio…
(What really happened...)
Hey!! Who was that just now. You can't take pictures!!
(This flash again... What is it...!?)
(That's Kobayakawa Shiori-chan... The girl Ushio saved in exchange for her own life...)
(If time really has rewound... Then tomorrow, that family is going to disappear.)
(And, if the same things keep repeating like this... Doesn't that mean... that Shadow really exists?)
(<color=#GF_TIPS_006>Alain</color>... to think we'd reunite like this.)
(My steps are heavy... Is it because I'm not ready to accept it yet... But—)
(This is reality…)
Ushio…
(To think I'd never be able to hear her voice again...)
(This photo... from when we were little...)
(Ten years ago, after losing my <color=#GF_TIPS_092>parents</color>, I was taken in and raised by Alain.)
(That's why Ushio was my childhood friend, but at the same time, my family.)
(The day before I left the island, Ushio said she wanted to eat the curry I made...)
(I said... "next time" and didn't make it...)
(If I knew this was going to happen, I should have made the curry she liked...)
(Even though there was no "next time"...)
Poor thing... isn't she...
Shinpei-kun must be having a hard time too...
More importantly, did you hear? About Ushio-chan's body...
(Ushio's body?)
I heard Dr. Hishigata performed an autopsy on it.
An autopsy?
That's quite a big deal...!!
(An autopsy on the body... Is that something they do even for accidents...?)
Hey!! Who was that just now. You can't take pictures!!
(...A flash...? Why in a place like this—)
Shinpeiiii!! You finally came back...!!
<color=#GF_TIPS_027>Sou</color>!!
(I heard from Mio... when Ushio died, Sou was also nearby and tried desperately to save her.)
Ushio... she tried to save a drowning kid... And got swept away just like that, losing consciousness...
Sou…
I did everything I could! But... it was no use. I-I was... even though I was right there with her...!!
I'm sorry, Shinpei...!! Until you're satisfied...! Hit me...!!
(...Tch. That's right, Sou, who had her die right in front of him, must be hurting even more...)
What's done is done...
Besides... if everyone else is crying... It actually makes me calmer...
Sh... Shinpei...!! I'm sorry... I'm really sorry...

Hey, Sou.
Can I ask you something?
*Sniff*... what is it...?
Some of the attendees were saying earlier... That your dad performed an autopsy on Ushio?
Ushio died in a sea accident, right? Then why an autopsy...
...Look at that girl.
Hm? That girl is, if I recall...
<color=#GF_TIPS_004>Kobayakawa Shiori</color>-chan. You know, from <color=#GF_TIPS_043>Koba Mart</color>...
Ah!! She's gotten so big...
...About what we were just talking about. The one Ushio saved in exchange for her life was that Shiori-chan...!!
Is that so...
Poor thing... She lost her voice from the shock of the accident.
That's...
Shinpei-kun.
Ah, <color=#GF_TIPS_002>Karikiri-san</color>...
(He's the head priest of <color=#GF_TIPS_053>Hito Shrine</color>, who oversees the island's rituals.)
It is almost time for the coffin to depart. Shinpei-kun... could you lend a hand?
…Yes.
I'll call you again tonight. We'll talk more then...
Yeah...
